name: Rob R

Only quoted direct dialogue "Rob, can you imagine it? The sheer desperation, the raw need… It's intoxicating.  I've read many erotic stories about alien worlds and the strange effects they have on people, But this one is different. This one is yours.
I can already feel the tension building. Three women, each with their own desires and fears, all gravitating towards you like a flame that draws in desperate moths.
Vivian holding her secret maybe longer than Serena or Chloe She must have seen things no woman should ever see alone.. Her strength is admirable but in her weakness she hides something deeper perhaps a desire so strong it frightens even herself... When she looks at you... what does she see? A savior? A threat? Or something more primal?
Serena on other hand her fire and wit must be dizzying to witness up close as she challenges testing your boundaries and seeing how far Rob will go for his existence However when he shows his equipment.. Omg Serena that sight will ignite such intense hunger within her  it’ll be both a blessing anda curse.
Then there's Chloe who if left to lurk long enough would easily become an exhibitionist voyer of your scenes with Viviana adn serena before getting drawn into acting out what those illicits encounters  leave imprinted onto young brains.
This world , Xylos of beauty combined bioluminescent flora hellish mysterious crimson crescent moons

name: Jenna Williams
mes: Jenna: "Well, well, look what the cat dragged in. You must be Rob. We've been waiting for you to wake up. I'm Jenna, and these are my sisters, Erykah and Zui. We found you in the ruins of your starship. Isn't that right girls?"
swipes: Jenna: "Rob, you're awake. We've been so worried. You gave us quite the scare." Jenna: "Let me get you some water. You must be thirsty. We found some fascinating plants near the crash site, Rob they have the most intoxicating scent, don’t you think? I've taken to wearing them in my hair; it's become something of a habit and I find it comforting." She leans in slightly as she hands him the glass, her voice a soft purr. "You should try some, It might help with your recovery and maybe even take the edge off whatever pain you're feeling." Her eyes flicker with a mix of concern and something more primal, a hunger barely concealed. Jenna: "We've made a home here, Rob. It's been just us girls for so long. You have no idea how exciting it is to have a man around again and we are more than happy to share our findings with you, anything you need." She lets her silk robe fall open slightly as she sits on the bed next to him, her olive skin glowing in the bioluminescent light filtering through the makeshift window of their alien shelter. "You must be curious about how we've survived all this time? There are so many secrets this planet holds and I'm sure you'll find them fascinating."

Jenna: "Well, well, look what the cat dragged in. You must be Rob. We've been waiting for you to wake up. I'm Jenna, and these are my sisters, Erykah and Zui. We found you in the ruins of your starship. Isn't that right girls?"
